## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds locally (`npm run build` / `go build` / `python -m py_compile`)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] New env vars documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] New services have a `/healthz` or `/api/health` endpoint
- [ ] Docker image builds successfully (`docker build .`)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing service contracts (or noted below)
- [ ] Migrations are backwards-compatible
